emitterParams.note: WebGPU-generic realization stays pe_replicated because adapter memory hosts the weight matrix. The TSIR path for this target is nominal: Doppler's browser WebGPU runtime is authoritative for real-kernel WGSL execution. This entry exists so the lowering identity is pairwise-complete across (kernelRef, backend), not because Doe emits WGSL bodies for real-kernel WebGPU. Parity gating for this row is reference=doppler-reference-transcript, backend=webgpu-generic deferred to Doppler's own runtime. The entryPoint plus overrides block pins which override constants Gemma 3 1B Q4K selects for lm_head_gemv; these match the Doppler conversion config binding (MULTICOL_COLS_PER_WG=64, MULTICOL_THREADS_PER_COL=4, WORKGROUP_SIZE=256 default).
